mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, u.institution_id, i.institution_name, ur.role_id, r.role_name FROM teacher t LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u ON t.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN institution i ON u.institution_id = i.id LEFT JOIN user_role_list ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_tbrole r ON ur.role_id = r.id
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.name}, '%')
AND t.identity_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.identityId}, '%')
AND t.idcard LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.idcard}, '%')
AND t.gender = #{param.gender}
AND t.nationality LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.nationality}, '%')
AND t.position LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.position}, '%')
AND t.professional_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.professionalTitle}, '%')
AND t.educational_background = #{param.educationalBackground}
AND t.is_party_number = #{param.isPartyNumber}
ORDER BY t.add_datetime
ASC DESC
SELECT u.institution_id FROM teacher t LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.id = #{teacherId}

SELECT ser.id AS recordId, ser.teaching_question_bank_id AS bankId, tqb.name AS bankName, ser.student_id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, ser.add_datetime AS submitTime, ser.exercise_num AS exerciseNum FROM student_exercises_record ser LEFT JOIN teaching_question_bank tqb ON ser.teaching_question_bank_id = tqb.id LEFT JOIN student s ON ser.student_id = s.id
ser.status = 1
AND tqb.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.bankName}, '%')
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.studentName}, '%')
AND ser.teaching_question_bank_id = #{param.bankId}
ORDER BY ser.add_datetime
ASC DESC
